Already published on:
[[https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btaf082]{.underline}](https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btaf082)

# 

# Input files used:

- All the in-house dataset and public datasets for benchmarking can be
 > found here:
 > [[https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn63884734]{.underline}](https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn63884734)

# Results and analysis files:

- All the results and the jupyter notebooks to repeat the analysis can
 > be found here:
 > [[https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn63884734]{.underline}](https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn63884734)

# Developed code or analysis utils:

- Tribus can be found here:
 > [[https://github.com/farkkilab/tribus]{.underline}](https://github.com/farkkilab/tribus)

# Experiment plans:

- This is a computational project; thus, no wet-lab experiment was
 > included.

# Computational & storage resources: 

- The datasets are stored in Synapse, as shown before.

- All analyses are done on Ziqi's, Angela's, and Teodora's laptops.

# Additional key relevant files:

[[Tribus]{.underline}](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1DwQNoramw0da3HBR8ZcwTRybq96Je69h)
